Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.commons.function.Memoizer

Packages that use Memoizer
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.function
Functional programming utilities including enhanced function interfaces, consumers, suppliers, tuples, exception-handling variants, and large-dataset streaming APIs.
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.settings
Thread-safe system property access with support for global and per-thread overrides, making it useful for unit tests and configuration management.

  • Uses of Memoizer in org.apache.juneau.commons.function

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.function that return Memoizer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Memoizer<T>
    Memoizer.copy()
    Creates a copy of this memoizer.
    Memoizer<T>
    Memoizer.filter(Predicate<? super T> predicate)
    If a value is present, and the value matches the given predicate, returns a Memoizer describing the value, otherwise returns an empty Memoizer.
    <U> Memoizer<U>
    Memoizer.map(Function<? super T,? extends U> mapper)
    If a value is present, applies the provided mapping function to it and returns a Memoizer describing the result.
    static <T> Memoizer<T>
    Suppliers.memoizer(Supplier<T> supplier)
    Resettable memoizing supplier.

  • Uses of Memoizer in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject that return Memoizer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Memoizer<T>
    BeanInstantiator.asMemoizer()
    Converts this creator into a memoizer.
    Memoizer<T>
    BeanInstantiator.Builder.asMemoizer()
    Converts this creator into a memoizer.

  • Uses of Memoizer in org.apache.juneau.commons.settings

    Subclasses of Memoizer in org.apache.juneau.commons.settings
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Setting<T>
    A memoizer that provides convenience methods for type conversion.
    class 
    StringSetting
    A specialized Setting for string values that provides convenience methods for type conversion.
